title: Melted Ukrainian Coconut Mousse
description: A sweet, gooey dessert that showcases Ukrainian flavors with a spicy harissa kick, coconut cream, and a creamy texture.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine coconut cream, coconut milk, cocoa powder, coconut sugar, and harissa paste, whisking until smooth.
Heat the mixture over medium heat until it reaches 80°C, turning frequently to prevent scorching.
Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and agar-agar powder until fully dissolved.
Pour the hot mixture into a heat‑proof bowl and let it cool to 40°C before refrigerating.
Churn the cooled mixture in an ice‑cream maker for 15 minutes until thick and airy.
Transfer the churned mousse into serving glasses, filling them to the top.
Chill the glasses in the refrigerator for 30 minutes to set the mousse.
Dust the mousse with powdered sugar and sprinkle toasted coconut flakes before serving.
Optionally drizzle a little extra harissa for a spicy finish.
Serve immediately as a sweet, gooey dessert that showcases Ukrainian flavors.
